name: README Maintainer
description: Example local plugin manifest for documentation and release-note maintenance workflows.
author: CodexApp

capabilities.name: readme_review
capabilities.description: Reviews README content for missing setup, usage, and release information.

mcpConnectors.name: README Tools
mcpConnectors.description: Local stdio connector that answers MCP initialize and exposes README-oriented tool metadata.
